title: NHRC – Junior Research Consultants
shortInfo: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Junior Research Consultants. Candidates with LLB, M.A, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NHRC website, nhrc.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: NHRC Junior Research Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Junior Research Consultants. Candidates with LLB, M.A, M.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 09-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NHRC website, nhrc.nic.in.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates may apply online only through the link: https://hrcnet.nic.in/job/candidate/Register.aspx on or before 9th June 2026.
Applications received after the due date or through any other mode will not be entertained.
seo_tags: National Human Rights Commission Junior Research Consultants Recruitment 2026
